Home.heroTitle: Smart supplement choices, grounded in scientific evidence
Home.heroSubtitle: Look up ingredients, compare quality and price with an AI that cites every claim from trusted scientific sources.

Home.valueProp2Body: Stay on the right dose, at the right time, every day.
Home.valueProp3Body: Stay current with the latest, most accurate supplement information.
